description.value:
The target must be bearing a child (of any type) and be within a day from going into labor or otherwise birthing it. You take the soul stored with the Katou Shin Fuuin technique, and transfer it from the object into the unborn child. The unborn child gains a bonus to a score modifier, up to +4. (For example, if the subject's highest ability score was 20 Constitution, the infant would gain a +4 bonus to Constitution; in case of a tie, single ability score based on the subject's highest ability determine at random).

In addition, the child gains any template or bloodline the subject has (except Moujuu Aishou), and has a 75% chance to gain the subject's primary allegiance as one of its own allegiances. The GM may decide to award additional effects or special templates depending on the subject (such as granting the Ghastly Inheritance template when sealing the Kyuubi's spirit). Upon child- birth, the creature that bore the child will die (no save). If the target succeeded at their save, the soul escapes and vanishes, allowing it to later be resurrected once again.
